- The table was joined with `EABLG`, `SALES_MASTER`, and `NET_MASTER`.

structured_content.response:
The process `J09A` has been executed end-to-end with the following outcomes:

- All relevant `decision_table` rows for tours starting with `J09A` were copied into `J09A_temp` and classified into `ENTSCHEIDUNG` (`KSA`/`EVU`) according to the specified rules.
- The table was joined with `EABLG`, `SALES_MASTER`, and `NET_MASTER`.
- Customer data from `SALES_MASTER` was used where available; otherwise, data from `NET_MASTER` was used.
- A CSV file `J09A.csv` was generated with exactly the required columns and order, containing 20,866 rows:
  - `"Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No."`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.
- The CSV was emailed to `meter.readings@evu.com` with the attachment path:
  - `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_500_values_processadaptationmethod_generate_bpmn_tour_J09A_seed_1824/J09A.csv`
- Temporary tables (`J09A_temp` and intermediates) were dropped and the process is complete.

kwargs.content:
Process `J09A` has been run successfully with these results:

- All relevant `decision_table` rows for tours starting with `J09A` were copied into `J09A_temp` and classified into `ENTSCHEIDUNG` (`KSA` / `EVU`) per the process rules.
- The data was joined with `EABLG`, `SALES_MASTER`, and `NET_MASTER`.
- Customer data priority was applied: `SALES_MASTER` data used where available; otherwise `NET_MASTER`.
- A CSV file `J09A.csv` was generated with 20,866 rows and the exact required columns in order:
  - `"Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No."`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`,  
    `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.
- The CSV was emailed to `meter.readings@evu.com` with attachment path:
  - `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_500_values_processadaptationmethod_generate_bpmn_tour_J09A_seed_1824/J09A.csv`
- Temporary tables (`J09A_temp` and any intermediate tables) were dropped; the process is complete.

If you want, I can now:
- Run another process by ID, or
- Help you adapt/define a new process rule from a description or BPMN.
